purpose: Training-time reference for IGBT full-physics λ ablation (best validation loss and early stopping). Complements igbt_conclusion_metrics.json (which focuses on post-hoc monotonicity statistics).
note: Regenerate by inspecting results/igbt_lambda*_full_history.json after run_igbt.py --diffusion-train.
discussion_hook: Larger lambda_physics tends to increase diffusion training val_loss under fixed capacity/epochs, consistent with a stronger physics-data trade-off on IGBT.
